# ngx-quill

**Version:** 30.0.1 (ngx-quill), 2.0.3 (quill)
**Source:** https://github.com/KillerCodeMonkey/ngx-quill
**Generated:** 2026-03-25

## Overview

ngx-quill is an Angular module wrapping the Quill Rich Text Editor (v2). It provides `<quill-editor>` and `<quill-view>` components with template-driven and reactive form support.

## Angular Compatibility

| Angular | ngx-quill | Supported Until |
|---------|-----------|-----------------|
| v21     | >= 29.x   | May 2027        |
| v20     | 28.x      | Nov 2026        |

## Installation & Setup

```bash
npm install ngx-quill quill
```

Peer dependencies: `@angular/core`, `@angular/common`, `@angular/forms`, `@angular/platform-browser`, `quill ^2.0.0`, `rxjs`.

### Include Quill Theme CSS

Add to `angular.json` styles array:

```json
"styles": [
  "node_modules/quill/dist/quill.snow.css",
  "src/styles.css"
]
```

Or import in `styles.css`:

```css
@import 'quill/dist/quill.snow.css';
```

### Standalone Configuration (Angular 21+)

```typescript
import { provideQuillConfig } from 'ngx-quill/config';

export const appConfig: ApplicationConfig = {
  providers: [
    provideQuillConfig({
      modules: {
        syntax: true,
        toolbar: [
          ['bold', 'italic', 'underline', 'strike'],
          ['blockquote', 'code-block'],
          [{ header: 1 }, { header: 2 }],
          [{ list: 'ordered' }, { list: 'bullet' }],
          [{ color: [] }, { background: [] }],
          ['link', 'image', 'video'],
          ['clean'],
        ],
      },
    }),
  ],
};
```

### Syntax Highlighting with Prism.js

Follow Quill's Syntax Highlight Module Guide: https://quilljs.com/docs/modules/syntax/

```typescript
import { provideQuillConfig } from 'ngx-quill/config';

provideQuillConfig({
  modules: {
    syntax: true,
  },
})
```

Requires `prismjs` to be loaded (add CSS theme + JS to `angular.json`).

## Core Concepts

- **QuillEditorComponent** (`<quill-editor>`): Full editor with toolbar, forms integration.
- **QuillViewComponent** (`<quill-view>`): Read-only renderer using QuillJS.
- **QuillViewHTMLComponent** (`<quill-view-html>`): HTML-based read-only view (deprecated with Quill v2).

## API Reference

### QuillEditorComponent Inputs

| Input | Type | Default | Description |
|-------|------|---------|-------------|
| ngModel | any | - | Two-way binding for template-driven forms |
| formControl | FormControl | - | Reactive form binding |
| format | 'html' \| 'object' \| 'text' \| 'json' | 'html' | Model value format |
| theme | 'snow' \| 'bubble' | 'snow' | Quill theme |
| modules | object | default toolbar | Quill modules config |
| readOnly | boolean | false | Disable editing |
| placeholder | string | 'Insert text here ...' | Placeholder text |
| maxLength | number | - | Validation: max length |
| minLength | number | - | Validation: min length |
| required | boolean | false | Required validation |
| sanitize | boolean | false | DomSanitizer for HTML format |
| bounds | string \| HTMLElement | document.body | Editor boundary |
| debounceTime | number | - | Debounce model changes (ms) |
| classes | string | - | CSS classes on editor element |

### QuillEditorComponent Outputs

| Output | Payload |
|--------|---------|
| onEditorCreated | Quill instance |
| onContentChanged | { editor, html, text, content, delta, oldDelta, source } |
| onSelectionChanged | { editor, range, oldRange, source } |
| onEditorChanged | text-change or selection-change event |
| onFocus | { editor, source } |
| onBlur | { editor, source } |

## Common Usage Patterns

### Basic Editor

```html
<quill-editor
  [(ngModel)]="editorContent"
  [modules]="quillModules"
  theme="snow"
  placeholder="Write something..."
></quill-editor>
```

### With Reactive Forms

```typescript
editorControl = new FormControl('');
```

```html
<quill-editor [formControl]="editorControl"></quill-editor>
```

### Custom Toolbar via Projection

```html
<quill-editor>
  <div quill-editor-toolbar>
    <span class="ql-formats">
      <button class="ql-bold"></button>
      <button class="ql-italic"></button>
    </span>
  </div>
</quill-editor>
```

## Known Issues

- IME/special characters can add unwanted newlines.
- formControl/model change triggers on first render.
- HTML format has issues with Quill v2 (`getSemanticHtml()`).
- **Recommendation**: Use Delta format (object/json) instead of HTML for reliable content storage.

## Best Practices

- Use `provideQuillConfig()` for standalone apps (not `QuillModule.forRoot()`).
- Prefer Delta format over HTML for storage and interop.
- Add `debounceTime` for large documents to improve performance.
- Use `onlyFormatEventData: true` with non-HTML formats for better performance.
- For SSR, use `isPlatformBrowser` guard or `beforeRender` for lazy CSS loading.

## Required Manual Actions

None.
